title.zh: 欢迎来到KidsLab · 从一盏灯到宇宙
title.en: Welcome to KidsLab · From a Lamp to the Cosmos

description.zh: 一场 Three.js 宇宙拉远之旅：从书桌上的一盏灯，穿过城市与地球，抵达银河与宇宙深处。四行诗与轻史诗配乐随尺度生长，点击底部圆点可在六个尺度间穿梭。
description.en: A Three.js cosmic zoom-out: from a desk lamp, past the city and the Earth, to the galaxy and the deep universe. A four-line poem and a light-epic score grow with the scale — tap the dots to jump between six worlds.

description.zh: 切一块披萨，认识分数！调整分子分母，看看小数、百分数和等值分数怎么变。
description.en: Slice a pizza to meet fractions! Tweak the numerator and denominator to see decimals, percentages and equivalent fractions change.

description.zh: 夜晚森林里圈住数字萤火虫，让它们相加正好等于灯笼上的目标数。凑出 10 会触发最亮的光爆——凑十法是最划算的抓法！
description.en: Lasso glowing number fireflies so they add up to the lantern's target. Making ten sets off the brightest burst — the make-ten trick pays!

description.zh: 客人订 24 个苹果？拖出 4 行 × 6 列播种，浇水长成果林正好交货！同一订单多种种法，转个方向就是交换律——乘法是种出来的。
description.en: An order for 24 apples? Plant 4 rows × 6 columns, water them, and harvest exactly right! Many layouts per order — rotate the field and discover commutativity.

description.zh: 给小羊驼搭出每一套不重样的帽子和上衣，让组合树一枝枝开花；最后反过来为 12 套时装秀搭配设计进货单。
description.en: Dress a little alpaca in every unique hat-and-top outfit and watch a combination tree bloom, then work backward to stock exactly 12 fashion-show looks.

description.zh: 把 23×14 的大厦拆成四块施工区：20×10、20×4、3×10、3×4。算完局部房间再合并总数，用能亲手盖起来的面积模型理解多位数乘法与乘除互逆。
description.en: Split a 23×14 tower into four build zones: 20×10, 20×4, 3×10 and 3×4. Solve each area, combine the rooms, and use a buildable area model to understand multi-digit multiplication and inverse division.

description.zh: 用固定长度的栅栏给仓鼠围草地：同样的周长，围法不同面积天差地别！靠墙围、L 形围，当一名让仓鼠开心打滚的围栏设计师。
description.en: Fence a lawn for hamsters with a fixed length of fence: same perimeter, wildly different areas! Use walls and L-shapes to make every hamster roll with joy.

description.zh: 变身会算账的售货机，为小动物配出刚刚好的找零；零钱不够时，把 1 元换成 10 个 1 角继续营业。
description.en: Become a change-making vending machine for animal customers, and exchange one yuan for ten jiao when the coin tubes run short.

description.zh: 一场十倍缩放之旅：从 1 米的小朋友出发，滚一格放大 10 倍——树、城市、地球、银河；再反向钻进瓢虫、蚂蚁的眼睛。数位不是练习册上的表格，是宇宙的楼层。
description.en: A powers-of-ten journey: start at a 1-meter kid, scroll to zoom ×10 — trees, cities, Earth, the galaxy; then dive down into ladybugs and ants' eyes. Place value isn't a worksheet — it's the floors of the universe.

description.zh: 拖着蘸了颜料的车轮滚一圈：画出的线总是直径的 3.14 倍——这个倍数就是 π！再把圆切成小片、拼成长方形，圆面积公式 πr² 一看就明白。
description.en: Roll a paint-dipped wheel one full turn: the line is always about 3.14 diameters long — that's π! Then slice a circle into pieces and rebuild it as a rectangle to see why area = πr².

description.zh: 皮影戏舞台后藏着 3D 积木：固定光源从幕布正前方投影，圆柱正着看是圆、侧着看是长方形！挑选并转动积木，观察不同立体图形的影子剪影。
description.en: Behind the shadow-play stage hide 3D blocks: a fixed front light projects each solid onto the curtain, so a cylinder can appear as a circle head-on or a rectangle from the side. Pick and rotate blocks to explore each silhouette.

description.zh: 机器人摄影师从正面、上面、侧面拍方块雕塑，你来预测照片；反过来只给三张照片，亲手一块块搭出看不见的雕塑——三视图是拼出来的空间想象。
description.en: A robot photographer shoots voxel sculptures from the front, top and side — you predict each photo. Then flip it: given just three photos, build the hidden sculpture block by block.

description.zh: 用单位小方块搭鱼缸、数方块算体积，给每条鱼配够水量；再把丑石头丢进满水缸，溢出的水正好流进量杯——不规则物体的体积被你量出来了！
description.en: Build tanks from unit cubes, count blocks to find volume, and give every fish enough water. Then drop a lumpy rock into a full tank — the overflow fills a measuring cup, and you've measured the unmeasurable!

description.zh: 长方形纸片一转成圆柱、三角形一转成圆锥——旋转体亲眼看见！再用圆锥杯舀冰淇淋倒进等底等高的圆柱杯：一杯、两杯、三杯刚好满，×1/3 的秘密有了画面。
description.en: Spin a rectangle into a cylinder and a triangle into a cone — solids of revolution before your eyes! Then scoop with a cone cup into a cylinder of equal base and height: one, two, three scoops fill it exactly. The 1/3 finally makes sense.

description.zh: 拖动 a、b、c 三个旋钮，亲眼看见一次函数、二次函数、反比例和正弦曲线如何变形。
description.en: Drag the a, b, c knobs and watch linear, quadratic, inverse and sine curves morph in real time.

description.zh: 把百数表变成地铁图：乘坐 ±10 快车和 ±1 慢车，用最少步数把乘客送到目标站，发现十位与个位的路线秘密。
description.en: Turn the hundred chart into a metro map. Ride the ±10 express and ±1 local to reach each stop in the fewest moves and uncover the tens-and-ones route secret.

description.zh: 当小镇钟楼管理员，拨动联动的时针和分针，按时叫醒面包房、校车、钓鱼客和晚安灯，认识整时、半时与几时几分。
description.en: Run the town clock tower. Move its linked hands to wake the bakery, school bus, fishing crew, and bedtime lights while learning hours, half-hours, and minutes.

description.zh: 开动四条数位流水线，把 10 颗珠子压成 1 个高位零件，也把 1 个高位零件拆成 10 个低位零件，亲手完成进位与退位。
description.en: Run four place-value lines: press 10 parts into 1 higher-place part or split 1 into 10 lower-place parts to master carrying and borrowing.

description.zh: 选择豌豆、向日葵或番茄，调节光照、湿度、温度和养分，浇水施肥并快进时间，观察植物从种子到开花结果的变化。
description.en: Choose a pea, sunflower, or tomato plant, tune light, humidity, temperature, and nutrients, then water, fertilize, and fast-forward time to watch realistic growth.

description.zh: 拖动摆球放手，对比非线性仿真周期与小角近似公式 T≈2π√(L/g)，探索不同参考重力。
description.en: Release the bob and compare the nonlinear simulated period with the small-angle approximation T≈2π√(L/g) under different reference gravities.

description.zh: 选择典型样品并切换指示剂，观察示意颜色与 pH 的关系；每次选择都会换成一杯新样品。
description.en: Choose a typical sample and switch indicators to explore the modelled relationship between colour and pH; each choice replaces the sample.

description.zh: 用「前进、右转、重复」指挥小海龟画出正方形、五角星和彩虹螺旋 —— 你的第一门编程语言！
description.en: Command a turtle with “forward, right, repeat” to draw squares, stars and rainbow spirals — your first programming language!

description.zh: 机器人管家完全按字面执行命令：顺序排错不报错，而是忠实演出一场厨房灾难——先涂黄油再进烤箱？糊啦！排对指令卡，让挑剔的小主人吃上完整早餐。
description.en: The robot butler does exactly what you say: wrong order means no error message — just a faithful kitchen disaster. Butter before toasting? Charcoal! Arrange the cards so breakfast survives.

description.zh: 组建动物乐队，乐谱只能用循环块写：重复 4 次[咚 哒]！把循环套进循环做出整首歌，用越少的块写出同样的音乐，乐队评分越高。
description.en: Form an animal band whose sheet music is made of loop blocks: repeat 4 × [boom clap]! Nest loops to build whole songs — fewer blocks for the same music means a higher score.

description.zh: 给动物园的自动喂食机编规则：如果是食草动物就投青草，否则投肉——直到熊猫出现！加特例、调顺序、组合与和或，看你的规则机一只不错地喂饱 30 只动物。
description.en: Program the zoo's auto-feeder: IF herbivore THEN grass ELSE meat — until the panda shows up! Add special cases, reorder rules, combine AND/OR, and feed 30 animals without a single mix-up.

description.zh: 给生病的小程序做听诊：先预测病灶，再逐行执行、观察变量，只改一行让计数器、机器人和循环恢复健康。
description.en: Diagnose sick programs: predict the faulty line, step through the code, watch variables change, then fix one line to heal counters, robots, and loops.

description.zh: 企鹅按个头排队只能两两比较、相邻交换。先徒手排，再雇冒泡、选择、插入三位算法教练同场赛跑——比较次数实时对决，亲眼看出算法的性格！
description.en: Penguins line up by height, but you can only compare two at a time. Sort by hand, then hire Bubble, Selection and Insertion coaches for a three-lane algorithm race — comparison counters dueling live!

description.zh: 把金币、龙的怒气和颜色装进会变化的魔法罐，用赋值咒语让数值增长、翻倍，再借一个空罐完成经典交换谜题。
description.en: Store coins, dragon anger, and colors in changing magic jars. Use assignment spells to update and double values, then borrow an empty jar to solve the classic swap puzzle.

description.zh: 化身五感小侦探：听声音、摸触感、闻气味、照剪影，让不符合证据的候选一个个退场，用最少线索猜中盒中宝物。
description.en: Become a senses detective: listen, touch, smell, and reveal a silhouette. Eliminate suspects with evidence and identify the hidden object using as few clues as possible.

description.zh: 经营一家会见证变形的旅馆：为蝴蝶、青蛙和蝗虫的每个生命阶段安排合适房间，看它们从入住到退房彻底变样。
description.en: Run a hotel that witnesses amazing transformations. Match every life stage of a butterfly, frog, and grasshopper with the right room, then watch each guest check out transformed.

description.zh: 让八大行星在你眼前转起来！点一颗行星，看看它的一年有多长、藏着什么小秘密。
description.en: Set the eight planets spinning! Tap any planet to see how long its year is and the secrets it keeps.

description.zh: 接管天空运营公司：调大太阳让湖水蒸发、送水汽上高空凝成云、攒够重量按下降水！雨、雪、雾、雹全是同一套水循环机器的不同参数。
description.en: Run the sky company: crank up the sun to evaporate the lake, lift vapor to condense into clouds, then press the rain button! Rain, snow, fog and hail are just different settings of one water-cycle machine.

description.zh: 物质是一间迪斯科舞厅，分子是舞客，你是掌管温度的 DJ：慢歌固态方阵摇摆，快歌液态滑动，拉满全场乱飞变气态！微观舞池与宏观视图左右分屏、永远同步。
description.en: Matter is a disco, molecules are dancers, and you're the DJ of temperature: slow songs for a solid lattice, faster for liquid flow, max it out and dancers fly off as gas! Micro dance floor and macro view stay in sync, side by side.

description.zh: 老鼠小镇大停电！接电池、开关、灯泡组成回路，看电流粒子在导线里奔跑。串联一户烧全街黑，改成并联各亮各的；勺子能当导线吗？橡皮鸭呢？全靠你试！
description.en: Blackout in Mouse Town! Wire batteries, switches and bulbs into circuits and watch current particles race through the wires. Series makes the whole street go dark together — rewire in parallel! Can a spoon be a wire? A rubber duck? Try it!

description.zh: 入职地球运行调度中心：拨自转让北京日出，推公转让悉尼入夏，再亲手把 23.5° 的地轴掰直——全球四季瞬间消失！春夏秋冬全挂在这根斜斜的轴上。
description.en: Join Earth Operations: spin the globe to give Beijing a sunrise, push it along its orbit to bring summer to Sydney, then straighten the 23.5° axial tilt with your own hands — and watch the seasons vanish worldwide!

description.zh: 友善的狼人请你当生活规划师：满月夜开嚎叫音乐会，新月夜隐身买薯片。亲手拖动月球公转，从地球视角看月亮圆缺——月相原来是位置魔术！
description.en: A friendly werewolf needs a life planner: howling concerts on full moons, invisible chip runs on new moons. Drag the Moon around its orbit and watch its phase from Earth — it's all a game of positions!

description.zh: 无罗盘的古代大海上，你是领航员：连星成图认出大熊座，从北斗勺口延伸五倍找到北极星——全天唯一不动的星。开启星轨快进，满天星辰绕它画出同心圆弧！
description.en: On an ancient compass-less sea, you are the navigator: connect stars into the Great Bear, extend the Dipper's edge five times to find Polaris — the one star that never moves. Fast-forward the night and watch every star arc around it!

description.zh: 把自己缩小，坐上皮划艇随一口饭菜漂流人体：口腔急流、食道蠕动滑道、胃酸漩涡、小肠绒毛森林、大肠脱水隧道……最后你懂的出口。课本上的名词成了一条河。
description.en: Shrink down and raft through the body with a bite of food: mouth rapids, esophagus peristalsis slides, stomach acid whirlpools, the villi forest of the small intestine, the dehydration tunnel… and that exit. Textbook words become a river.

description.zh: 一场不许碰球的冰球赛！球是磁铁，你手里也是磁铁：翻面用吸力拉、斥力推，隔空把球送进球门。戴上磁场眼镜，看不见的磁力线第一次现出原形。
description.en: Ice hockey where touching the puck is forbidden! The puck is a magnet and so is yours: flip N/S to pull or push it into the goal from a distance. Put on field goggles and see invisible field lines come alive.

description.zh: 把整座彩虹塔搬到另一根柱子上，大盘子不能压小盘子。你能用最少的步数完成吗？
description.en: Move the rainbow tower to another peg — never place a big disc on a small one. Can you do it in the fewest moves?

description.zh: 亲手转动一颗逼真的 3D 魔方！2×2、3×3、4×4 三种阶数，三档打乱难度，卡住了还有提示和自动还原演示。
description.en: Spin a realistic 3D Rubik's cube! Three sizes from 2×2 to 4×4, three scramble levels, plus hints and an auto-solve demo when you're stuck.

description.zh: 帮小动物们住进笼舍！每行、每列、每个园区都不能有重复的动物。从 4×4 新手村一路闯到 9×9 传奇峰，5 级难度等你挑战！
description.en: House the animals so no row, column or pen repeats! Climb five difficulty tiers, from a friendly 4×4 village to the legendary 9×9 peak.

description.zh: 毛毛虫只吃「有规律的东西」：红-黄-红-黄-？喂对下一个它就长一节，颜色、声音、动作三种规律轮番登场。吃饱结茧，破茧的蝴蝶翅膀就是它吃过的规律花纹！
description.en: This caterpillar only eats things that follow a pattern: red-yellow-red-yellow-? Feed the right next item and it grows. Colors, sounds and moves — then it spins a cocoon, and the butterfly's wings wear every pattern it ate!

description.zh: 谁偷吃了蛋糕？读线索、在网格上钉下 ❌ 和 ✅，看排除法像多米诺一样连锁倒下，红线在软木板上织出真相之网——经典逻辑网格谜题的侦探社版本。
description.en: Who ate the cake? Read clues, pin ❌ and ✅ on the grid, and watch elimination cascade like dominoes as red strings weave the truth across the corkboard — classic logic-grid puzzles, detective style.

description.zh: 当太空港塔台指挥官，把外星飞船停进正确的集合区域。找到「两个条件都满足」的重叠区，也别漏掉哪边都不属于的飞船！
description.en: Guide alien ships into the right set at a spaceport. Discover the overlap where both rules are true — and the outer bay for ships that match neither!

description.zh: 和狡猾的狐狸轮流拿石子，每次 1–3 颗，拿到最后一颗就赢。狐狸开始总赢——直到你在复盘板上盯出「4 的倍数」的秘密，从结局倒着算出必胜策略！
description.en: Take turns grabbing 1–3 stones from a sly fox — whoever takes the last stone wins. The fox keeps winning… until you spot the multiples-of-4 trap on the replay board and reason backwards to a winning strategy!

description.zh: 红幕拉开，故事却缺了角色！拖动、旋转和翻转七块七巧板，拼出桥、狐狸和大雁；最后一块归位时，剪影会立刻活过来走进戏里。
description.en: The red curtain rises, but the story is missing its cast. Slide, turn, and flip all seven tangram pieces into a bridge, a fox, and a goose — then watch each finished shadow come alive on stage.
